title: Blue Canyon Nonslip Antibacterial Rubber Shower Mats, Quick Dry Bathmat for Shower with Suction Pads & Drain Holes, Mould Resistant Bathroom Accessory, Durable Bath Rug Runner 53x53 cm – Cream
features: 【 DURABLE RUBBER MATERIAL 】: You will definitely appreciate the luxury of standing on the Blue Canyon flexible & comfy shower mat made from Natural Rubber, as it supports your ankles and feet to stand with utmost relief for a more extended period. The Rubber material of this rug is enjoyable on the skin, helps ease the stress on joints, and maintains a good posture.

【 EASY WATER DRAINAGE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber shower runner rug comes with drainage holes that allow water to easily flow under the mat and towards the drain, helping to prevent water from sitting stagnant under the mat at your bath place & hence prevent mould formation.

【 ANTI-SLIP BACKING 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while taking a shower bath. Our high-performance Shower rug mat stays where you place it, as they come with the backing of suction pads, making it slip-resistant & eliminating the need for constant readjustments, and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 EFFORTLESS CLEANING 】: Our Rubber shower mat is durable enough to machine wash. After use, you can wash it with water & let it dry by hanging it in a ventilated place, or you can stick it on the walls so that all the water runs out from the mat; these ways, you can avoid mould formation.

【 FANCIFUL STYLING 】: Make your bathroom fun with our vibrant Rubber Shower Mat runners! These Pedestal mat rugs are suitable for most interior designs. Our fanciful styling shower mats are available in classic patterns. You can layer them or mix and match them according to your bathroom themes as they are designed keeping in mind the trending interior designing accessories.
description: From the brand Previous page About Us:- Blue Canyon is a privately owned importing and distribution company, bringing both expertise and a fully managed supply chain, we believe that the little things make a big difference. We offer a wide variety of bathroom accessories that are both stylish and functional. We have everything you need to create a bathroom that is both beautiful and practical, from toothbrush holders and soap dishes to towel racks and mirrors. We offer a wide range of products that are designed to make your bathroom look and feel its best. Our products are made from high-quality materials and are built to last. Our product line:- Welcome to Blue Canyon, where we include a wide variety of items to help you organize and style your bathroom. From towel racks and soap dishes to toothbrush holders and toilet paper holders, we have everything you need to make your bathroom look its best. Shop our collection today and experience the Blue Canyon difference! Next page
